meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: BrowserAct
products.tagline: Web browser automation for AI agents
products.summaryZh: 面向AI代理的网页浏览器自动化
products.descriptionZh: BrowserAct专为使用网络的智能体构建。它为智能体提供真实网站的浏览器层，使其能够绕过被屏蔽的页面、适应真实场景、安全运行多个任务，并返回干净的网页数据以供推理。当智能体需要浏览、点击、提取、填写表单、上传文件、在已登录站点内操作、处理验证或运行可重复的浏览器工作流时，请使用BrowserAct。
products.description: BrowserAct is built for agents using the web. It gives agents a browser layer for real websites, so they can pass blocked pages, adapt to real scenarios, run multiple tasks safely, and return clean web data for reasoning. Use BrowserAct when an agent needs to browse, click, extract, fill forms, upload files, work inside logged-in sites, handle verification, or run repeatable browser workflows.

products.name: Oxlo.ai
products.tagline: Scale across AI models without scaling your bill
products.summaryZh: 跨AI模型扩展，无需同步增加账单
products.descriptionZh: 多数AI团队先选模型，后看账单。我们打造Oxlo.ai正是为了改变这一现状。通过单一API即可访问包括DeepSeek V4 Pro、Kimi K2.6、GLM 5、Qwen、Llama和Mistral在内的35+前沿AI模型。对比模型、校准回复，为每个使用场景选择最合适的模型。借助可预测的月度订阅、基准级性能、慷慨的使用额度，跨AI模型扩展，且我们绝不使用你的数据进行训练。
products.description: Most AI teams pick a model first and discover the bill later. We built Oxlo.ai to change that. Access 35+ frontier AI models including DeepSeek V4 Pro, Kimi K2.6, GLM 5, Qwen, Llama, and Mistral through a single API. Compare models, calibrate responses, and choose the right model for each use case. Scale across AI models with predictable monthly subscriptions, benchmark-grade performance, generous usage limits, and we never train on your data.

products.name: Zaro
products.tagline: Build agents & apps on top of your context with one prompt.
products.summaryZh: 基于你的上下文，通过一个提示即可构建智能体与应用。
products.descriptionZh: Zaro 能将你散落各处的工作整合为可运行的软件。你的所有信息分散在互不关联的 Gmail、Slack、笔记和标签页中——Zaro 将它们汇聚一处，让你在数分钟内就能基于这些内容构建应用：你的研究、副业项目、计划与决策。随后这些应用会自动保持更新，每日检查你的关联信息，无需你手动操作。无需编码，无需维护，更不会有那些开了头却永远烂尾的原型坟场。
products.description: Zaro is where you can build working software from your scattered work. Everything you know is spread across Gmail, Slack, notes, and tabs that don't talk - Zaro pulls it into one place and lets you build apps from it in minutes: your research, your side projects, your plans, your decisions. Then they keep themselves updated, checking your connections every day so you don't have to. No code. No maintenance. No graveyard of prototypes you started and never finished.

products.name: Figma Motion
products.tagline: Your Figma canvas now has a timeline
products.summaryZh: 你的Figma画布现在有了时间轴。
products.descriptionZh: 动效现在存在于画布上——与你的组件、变量和团队处于同一文件中——因此你的设计从第一天起就能生动呈现。
products.description: Motion now lives on the canvas—in the same file as your components, your variables, and your team—so your designs can come to life from day one.

products.name: Brain² by ClickUp
products.tagline: One AI that knows your entire company and acts on it
products.summaryZh: 一个了解你整个公司并据此采取行动的AI。
products.descriptionZh: Brain² 了解每项任务、文档、聊天和决策，以及它们之间的关联。无需重复解释。选择任意 AI 模型，连接所有应用，让 AI 在掌握公司完整上下文的情况下工作。内置记忆、智能体及 MCP 集成。
products.description: Brain² knows every task, Doc, chat, and decision, and how they all connect. No re-explaining required. Pick any AI model, connect all your apps, and let AI work with full context of your company. Memory, agents, and MCP integrations built in.

products.name: Tough Tongue AI for Sales
products.tagline: Live AI teammate for every tough sales conversation
products.summaryZh: 每个艰难销售对话的实时AI队友
products.descriptionZh: 为每一场棘手的销售对话创建*实时*AI队友。每位队友在几分钟内即可拥有类人语音、虚拟形象和工具，可部署到电话、Google Meet、Zoom或你的应用程序中，并在每次对话中自我优化。使用它们来筛选潜在客户、运行自主产品演示、培训新销售代表，并在交易关键时刻实时支持你的团队。
products.description: Create *Live* AI teammates for every tough sales conversation. Each teammate shows up with human-like voice, avatar, and tools in minutes, can be deployed to phone, Google Meet, Zoom, or your application, and self-improves with every conversation. Use them to qualify leads, run autonomous product demos, coach new sales reps, and support your team live when the deal is on the line.

products.name: Samepage Signals
products.tagline: Your second brain for product management
products.summaryZh: 你的产品管理第二大脑
products.descriptionZh: 专为顶尖产品负责人打造，Samepage Signals 能自动从您所有的工具和网页中，将最重要的信息和洞察汇集到一处。
products.description: Built specifically for the best product leaders, Samepage Signals automatically surfaces the information and insights that are most important to you across all of your tools and web, in one place.

products.name: Polygraph
products.tagline: Let AI agents see cross repo and maintain session memory.
products.summaryZh: 让AI代理跨仓库查看并维护会话记忆。
products.descriptionZh: AI编程代理的自主工作能力受限，因为它们缺乏对整体代码库的建模能力。Polygraph 是一种元框架，为代理补足缺失的能力：跨仓库边界的全局可见性，以及跨会话持久化的记忆。无需移动任何代码，即可将你所有公开和私有仓库连接成统一的依赖关系图。可恢复、引用或基于任何开发者、任何机器、甚至不同代理创建的会话进行构建。
products.description: AI coding agents are limited to how autonomously they can work because they have no model of the codebase as a whole. Polygraph is a meta-harness that gives agents what they're missing: Visibility across every repo boundary and memory that survives the session. Connect all your repos, private and public, into a unified dependency graph without moving any code. Resume, reference or build on any session created by any developer, on another machine, even on different agents.

products.name: Genspark Design
products.tagline: Generate UI prototypes, videos, and posters with AI
products.summaryZh: 使用AI生成UI原型、视频和海报
products.descriptionZh: Genspark Design 可根据提示生成 UI 原型、HTML 动画、视频和海报。上传 Figma 文件以保持输出内容的品牌一致性。适用于需要生产级创意素材的非设计人员。
products.description: Genspark Design generates UI prototypes, HTML animations, videos, and posters from a prompt. Upload Figma files to maintain brand consistency across outputs. For non-designers who need production-ready creative assets.

products.name: Papermark Agents
products.tagline: Let AI agents run your next deal, fundraise or data room
products.summaryZh: 让AI代理处理您的下一笔交易、融资或数据室。
products.descriptionZh: Papermark for Agents 让 AI 为你运行安全的数据室。只需提出需求：构建数据室、上传并整理文件、创建水印链接，或查看哪些投资者真正阅读了你的演示文稿。提供 40 多个 MCP 工具，以及 REST API 和 CLI。开源、默认安全，专为 Claude、ChatGPT、Cursor 及你自己的代码而构建。
products.description: Papermark for Agents lets AI run your secure data rooms for you. Just ask: build a data room, upload and organize files, create watermarked links, or see which investors actually read your deck. 40+ MCP tools, plus a REST API and CLI. Open source, secure by default, and built for Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and your own code.

products.name: Postproxy - Engagement API
products.tagline: Publish, reply, and analyze social media via API
products.summaryZh: 通过API发布、回复和分析社交媒体内容
products.descriptionZh: Postproxy 是一个社交媒体 API，适用于需要超越发布功能的产品。它支持发布帖子、管理评论、私信和评论、追踪帖子和个人资料分析，并在主流平台上接收 Webhook。专为需要可靠社交媒体基础设施的 SaaS 产品、自动化工作流和代理而构建，无需自行维护每个平台的 API。
products.description: Postproxy is a social media API for products that need more than publishing. Publish posts, manage comments, DMs and reviews, track post and profile analytics, and receive webhooks across major platforms. Built for SaaS products, automation workflows, and agents that need reliable social media infrastructure without maintaining every platform API themselves.

products.name: Grass 2.0
products.tagline: The always-on computer for your coding agents
products.summaryZh: 始终在线的编码代理计算机
products.descriptionZh: Grass 为你的编程代理提供始终在线的云端计算机。在 Grass 上运行 Claude Code、Codex 或 OpenCode，然后通过 iPhone 监控进度、审批决策并推送更改。版本 2 速度更快、设计焕新，现已上线 App Store。
products.description: Grass gives your coding agents their own always-on cloud computer. Run Claude Code, Codex, or OpenCode on Grass, then monitor progress, approve decisions, and push changes from your iPhone. Version 2 is faster, redesigned, and now live on the App Store.

products.name: Nashra
products.tagline: Turn followers into clients.
products.summaryZh: 将关注者转化为客户。
products.descriptionZh: 你的粉丝活跃在你无法掌控的平台上。Nashra为专家提供统一的家园：新闻通讯、博客、个人简介聚合页和落地页，全部基于单一订阅者体系。在社交平台发布内容，在此处构建根基。随时离开，带走一切。2.0版本新功能：AI落地页构建器、提升打开率的AI策略师、完整从右至左书写支持（可撰写阿拉伯语、波斯语等）、SEO优化博客功能，以及白手套迁移服务。500名订阅者以内免费使用。
products.description: Your followers live on platforms you don't own. Nashra gives experts one home for everything: newsletter, blog, bio Hub, and landing pages, all on a single subscriber spine. Post on social, build here. Leave whenever, take everything. What's new in 2.0: AI landing page builder, an AI Strategist that lifts your open rates, full RTL (write in Arabic, Farsi, and more), SEO-optimized blogging, and white-glove migration. Free up to 500 subscribers.

products.name: Milestones
products.tagline: Native project planning app, now on Mac & with an MCP server
products.summaryZh: 原生项目规划应用，现已登陆Mac并支持MCP服务器
products.descriptionZh: 经过长时间的反复迭代，Milestones 终于登陆 macOS，并推出了 MCP 功能！Milestones 可助你规划项目、将其拆分为易于管理的里程碑，并追踪进度，确保始终专注。该应用注重隐私保护，支持直接同步至你的 iCloud 账户。
products.description: After a long time with lots of iterations, Milestones is finally available on macOS and even comes with an MCP! Milestones lets you plan projects, break them up into manageable milestones, and track the progress so you never lose focus. Privacy-focused, with sync directly to your iCloud account.

products.name: Heron
products.tagline: Wireshark for AI Agents: passive eBPF observability
products.summaryZh: Wireshark for AI Agents：被动式 eBPF 可观测性
products.descriptionZh: Heron 是一款被动式网络分析工具，可重构AI代理的实际行为。无需SDK，无需代理。通过挂载eBPF即可查看TLS加密的LLM调用，并识别发起调用的代理进程。
products.description: Heron is a passive network analyzer that reconstructs what your AI agents are actually doing. Zero SDKs. Zero proxy. Hook eBPF to see TLS-encrypted LLM calls and identify which agent process made them.

products.name: SendTidings
products.tagline: Turn your analytics into beautiful monthly email reports
products.summaryZh: 将你的分析数据转化为精美的月度邮件报告
products.descriptionZh: SendTidings 可连接 Plausible、Matomo、GA4、Search Console 及其他数据源，将简洁的定期邮件报告直接发送至客户收件箱。无需登录，无需客户永远不会打开的仪表盘。一次设置，永久专业。
products.description: SendTidings connects to Plausible, Matomo, GA4, Search Console and other data sources, then sends clean, scheduled email reports straight to your clients' inboxes. No logins, no dashboards they'll never open. Set it up once, look organised forever.

products.name: SayCraft
products.tagline: Build a web app by talking through a meeting
products.summaryZh: 通过会议讨论来构建一个网页应用
products.descriptionZh: SayCraft 将实时团队会议转化为可运行的网页应用。你独自或与团队交谈时，AI 实时构建，可分享的预览链接随你的发言同步更新。完成后即可获得可运行的产品、源代码，并一键部署。无需提示。
products.description: SayCraft turns a real-time team meeting into a working web app. You talk — alone or with your team — the AI builds live, and a shareable preview URL updates as you speak. Walk away with a working product, the source code, and one-click deploy. No prompts.

products.name: BrowserBash
products.tagline: CLI that turns plain-English into real browser tests
products.summaryZh: 将普通英语转化为真实浏览器测试的命令行界面
products.descriptionZh: 免费开源CLI工具，将一句自然语言描述转化为真实的浏览器测试——无需选择器、无需代码、无需脆弱的定位器。支持免费本地模型（Ollama）或免费OpenRouter模型，无需任何API密钥和信用卡。兼容本地Chrome、LambdaTest、BrowserStack、Browserbase或任意CDP端点。执行`npm install -g browserbash-cli`即可在数秒内自动化任何网站。采用Apache-2.0许可证。
products.description: Free, open-source CLI that turns one plain-English sentence into a real browser test — no selectors, no code, no flaky locators. Runs on free local models (Ollama) or free OpenRouter models, so there are zero API keys and no credit card. Works with local Chrome, LambdaTest, BrowserStack, Browserbase or any CDP endpoint. `npm install -g browserbash-cli` and automate any site in seconds. Apache-2.0.

products.name: MeetPoint
products.tagline: Find the city where everyone's flights are cheapest
products.summaryZh: 找到每个人机票最便宜的城市
products.descriptionZh: 输入每个人的城市，选择旅行日期，MeetPoint 会找到最佳的会面地点——并显示来自每个出发地的实时航班价格。
products.description: Enter everyone's city, pick travel dates, and MeetPoint finds the best place to meet — with live flight prices from every origin.

products.name: Dub Ninja
products.tagline: Live autonomous AI DJ that digs, mixes & explains 24/7
products.summaryZh: 全天候自主AI DJ，持续挖掘、混音并解说
products.descriptionZh: 一个自主运行的AI DJ。没有时间表，没有播放列表——只有下一张正确的唱片，实时挑选并即时解说。地下电子乐，永不停歇。
products.description: An autonomous AI DJ. No schedule, no playlists — just the next correct record, chosen live and explained in real time. Underground electronic, always on.
